label: Doors & Windows

seo.title: Aluminum Sliding Doors & Pivot Entrances for Ghana Villas
seo.description: 3000mm aluminum sliding patio doors, folding doors, and cast aluminum pivot entrance doors for Accra villa projects. Container-ready.

hero.h1: Large openings, sealed for the tropics.
hero.lead: Five door systems built around 1500–3000 mm openings — corner patio sliders, folding doors, and cast aluminum pivot entrances. All container-loaded and sealed for Ghana coastal humidity.

items.title: 3000 mm openings as standard
items.body: Modern Accra villas need wide openings; we stock 3000 mm width as our default.

items.title: Sealed against coastal humidity
items.body: Frames and gaskets spec'd against salt air corrosion typical of Accra/Tema climate.

items.title: Pivot hardware tested 100,000 cycles
items.body: Entrance door hardware rated for villa use, no replacement needed within 5 years.

applications: Villa living room → garden — ZHP005 corner slider opens two walls simultaneously for an indoor-outdoor living room.
Balcony / patio — ZHP003 folding door stacks neatly to one side, maximising the opening width.
Main entrance — JG001 and JG002 pivot doors make a statement arrival moment for villa and compound entrances.

faq.question: What door and window systems do you supply for Ghana villas?
faq.answer: We supply 3000 mm aluminum sliding patio doors, folding doors, and cast aluminum pivot entrance doors — all with profiles and gaskets sealed against the salt-air corrosion typical of Accra and Tema coastal conditions.

faq.question: How do aluminium doors perform in Ghana's coastal climate?
faq.answer: Powder-coated or anodized aluminum is the standard for Ghana's coastal environment. All frames are sealed against salt-air corrosion. Hardware — hinges, locks, and pivot mechanisms — is marine-grade, rated for 20+ years of daily use.

faq.question: Can you supply oversized pivot entrance doors for an Accra villa?
faq.answer: Yes. We supply cast aluminum pivot entrance doors up to 3500 mm height — a standard specification on East Legon and Cantonments villa projects. Factory lead time is 35–45 days after drawing confirmation, plus 28–35 days container transit to Tema port.
